summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travel Buddy MVP. Backend APIs working well (100% success rate after fixing authentication bug). Frontend pages loading correctly but critical login integration issue found.

fixed_bugs.issue: Authentication header not properly extracted using FastAPI dependency injection
fixed_bugs.fix: Updated get_current_user to use Header() dependency and updated admin endpoints to use Depends()

critical_bugs.issue: Login form submission not triggering API call - no network request made to /api/auth/login
critical_bugs.symptoms: Form submits but stays on login page, no token stored, no error displayed

passed_tests: Home page loads with navigation, hero, features, testimonials, stats, CTA sections
Backend API /api/auth/login works with admin credentials via curl
Backend API /api/auth/register creates new users successfully
Backend API /api/buddies search returns empty array (expected)
Admin API endpoints now working after authentication fix
Register page loads with all form elements
Search buddies page loads with filters and search functionality
Navigation between public pages working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical login form integration - form submission not triggering API call. The login API works correctly (tested with curl) but the frontend form is not making the network request. Issue may be in handleSubmit function, AuthContext, or form event handling.
